ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the asset during the trading period */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the asset during the trading period */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the asset during the trading period */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the asset during the trading period */,
  "fd" INTEGER /* Frequency distribution value */,
  "return" REAL /* Return calculated for the asset during the trading period */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the asset being traded */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio the trade belongs to */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy used */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment portfolio */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial amount invested in the portfolio */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio is denominated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience in portfolio management */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the manager belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the manager */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the manager logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio the strategy belongs to */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the strategy (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy was implemented */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the strategy is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy associated with the metrics */,
  "return" REAL /* Calculated return of the strategy */,
  "risk" REAL /* Risk associated with the strategy */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe Ratio for performance evaluation */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown experienced by the strategy */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for which the metrics are calculated (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value for performance evaluation */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value for performance evaluation */,
  "value_at_risk" REAL /* Value at Risk (VaR) for the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy that triggered the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., performance drop, significant loss) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message providing details about the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
